title: Test Password
subtitle: Test your password strength and see how long it takes to crack! 🕵️‍♂️
crackHighEntropy: Wow! This password would take forever to crack. Super hacker proof! 🌟
crackMediumEntropy: Looking great! It would take years to break this one. 👍
crackLowEntropy: Not bad, but adding more length or symbols would make it stronger! 🤔
crackVeryLowEntropy: Uh oh... This password could be cracked quickly. Add more characters! 🛑
basedOnGuesses: Based on 10 billion guesses per second.
makeLonger: Make it longer (at least 12 characters recommended)
excellentDesc: Your password meets all best practices for security and complexity. It would take a supercomputer millions of years to crack this.
vulnerabilityDesc: Passwords with a "Weak" or "Fair" rating are highly susceptible to dictionary attacks and brute-forcing. Consider using the Password Generator to create a secure alternative.
startTypingDesc: We'll instantly analyze its strength, estimate crack time, and give you tips to make it stronger. Your password never leaves your device!
